name: IRAN Real Events 2025
description: Real historical events from 2025 relevant to the iran entity. Source: Reubencf/2025_events HuggingFace dataset (154 events). Impact values are heuristic — curator review recommended before production training.

events.summary: Capital punishment in Saudi Arabia Saudi Arabia announces the execution of six Iranian nationals convicted of smuggling hashish. In Tehran, the Iranian Foreign Ministry summoned the Saudi ambassador in protest.

events.summary: Italy summons Iran's ambassador to demand the release of Il Foglio reporter Cecilia Sala, detained in Tehran for alleged legal violations.
events.public_summary: Italy summons Iran's ambassador to demand the release of Il Foglio reporter Cecilia Sala, detained in Tehran for alleged legal violations.

events.summary: The Iranian government releases Italian journalist Cecilia Sala from prison, with Sala arriving back in Rome later that day. (Euronews) (Yahoo! News)
events.public_summary: The Iranian government releases Italian journalist Cecilia Sala from prison, with Sala arriving back in Rome later that day. (Euronews) (Yahoo! News)

events.summary: A bus fell down a 100-meter gorge in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India, killing six and injuring 22. (The Tribune)
events.public_summary: A bus fell down a 100-meter gorge in Pauri Garhwal district, Uttarakhand, India, killing six and injuring 22. (The Tribune)

events.summary: 5 construction workers are trapped, 48 others are rescued and 4 people are killed after a group of 57 people are swept away by an avalanche near the Mana Pass, Uttarakhand, India. (CTV News)

events.summary: At least ten people are killed after five Al-Shabaab militants detonate a car bomb and attack a hotel in Beledweyne, Hiran, Somalia. (First Post)
events.public_summary: At least ten people are killed after five Al-Shabaab militants detonate a car bomb and attack a hotel in Beledweyne, Hiran, Somalia. (First Post)

events.public_summary: Somali security forces end the 24-hour siege at a hotel in Beledweyne, Hiran, Somalia, with at least fifteen civilians and all six Al-Shabaab attackers killed.

events.summary: Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei rejects negotiations with the U.S. regarding Iran's nuclear program, stating that Iran is "not interested in nuclear weapons".
events.public_summary: Iranian supreme leader Ali Khamenei rejects negotiations with the U.S. regarding Iran's nuclear program, stating that Iran is "not interested in nuclear weapons".

events.public_summary: The United States Air Force deploys 6 nuclear-capable B-2 stealth bombers to Diego Garcia, amid rising tensions with Iran over their nuclear program.
